The '''Steadfast''' was a class of combat [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was similar in firepower to a [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT]].

==Description==
The Steadfast was a huge repulsorcraft, equipped with five blaster cannons: one mounted at the rear of the vehicle, two facing forward, and two turreted blaster cannons atop the tank. With heavy armor and weaponry, the Steadfast was used to counter the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] MTTs. It was capable of defeating most Federation ground vehicles of the time, including [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AATs]] and [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]]. The Steadfast also could carry ten [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|royal troopers]].

==History==
Several Steadfast tanks were used during the [[Invasion of Spinnaker]] to attack the droid occupation forces.

==Appearances==
